A content coaching program for Indian creators
Brown
Out
Loud
Stop shrinking and start speaking.
bol/bōl/verb· Hindi & Urdu
"to speak"
B.O.L.  —  Brown Out Loud
The problem
So why is it so hard for Indians
to show up in the creator space?
  • Growing up, there was barely any Indian representation, not in sports, films, or online
  • Everybody else was getting represented. We were watching from the sidelines.
  • Nobody to look up to. Nobody to make us believe it was even possible.
  • Our stories deserve to be told.
My story
My whole life, I molded my personality into what I thought people wanted.
  • Started creating in June 2024, no audience, no blueprint, no idea who I was
  • 85 posts before 1K. 15 months of figuring it out alone.
  • Then I told specific, real, vulnerable stories and grew to 200K+ combined
  • I built BOL because I didn't want anyone else to figure this out alone
85 posts before 1K  ·  15 months figuring it out alone
The mindset shift
Most people quit before their breakthrough.
Pillar 01: Identity
Your story is
your edge.
You'll grow a following by being so true to yourself that no one can copy you.
  • Write a story and fill out your Ideal Viewer questionnaire
  • Find the specific, emotional moments of your life, not vague, recycled ideas
  • You have the stories. Perfectionism and overthinking kept them from coming to life
01
Pillar 02: Technical
The tools that will turn
your story into content.
Everything you need to go from overthinking to posting.
  • Storytelling Playbook: simple yet effective frameworks + tips
  • Hooks Playbook: the system for making viewers stop, watch and want more
  • 99 plug-and-play viral hooks: pulled from the most viral videos
  • AI prompts: from scattered ideas to viral hooks and structured stories
  • Weekly content audits: feedback on what you did well and what to do more of
02
Pillar 03: Community
Build the right environment,
and the content follows.
Surround yourself with the right people and you become one of them.
  • Weekly 1:1 call with me
  • My number in your phone, text me anything, anytime
  • BOL Community: group calls, and group chat with Indian creators on the same journey
03
Questions?
